# Attribution: Anthropic Skill Creator

This package preserves and adapts workflow concepts from Anthropic's public `skill-creator` Agent Skill materials, including skill creation interviews, eval prompt proposal, baseline comparison, grading, benchmark analysis, review feedback, and iterative improvement concepts.

The Pi implementation rewrites the active workflow around Pi extensions, the TypeScript SDK, terminal/TUI review, and durable `.pi/skill-creator/runs/` artifacts.

See `LICENSE-APACHE-2.0.txt` for the upstream license material.
